choices.text: Penalty mechanism: if Bob broadcasts old state (where he had more sats), Alice has CSV time window to broadcast breach tx with penalty key — takes 100% of channel. Bob loses everything. Watchtowers monitor when Alice is offline.

questions.explanation: Penalty tx punishes cheating with 100% loss.

questions.prompt: Channel funded with 1M sats, all on your side. Can you receive?

choices.text: No outbound liquidity matters — to receive, counterparty needs sats they can send to you (your inbound). Strategies: pay someone to push sats your way, use Lightning service provider, dual-funded channels, splice-in.

questions.explanation: Inbound liquidity required to receive payments.
